events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition — arc-flash label incident energy/category exceeding the arc rating shown on the worker's clothing DOC+ID tag — is a PPE selection defect under NFPA 70E Article 130 and OSHA 1910 Subpart I, so `decision` is `fail` with `high` risk pending PPE correction and re-inspection.
